calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Gena Eales.
Appearances:
Daniel Denenberg, Esq. for Plaintiff Window-Max, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness Alex Filshtinsky present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Debra Heller aka Debra Heller Israel for MONEY JUDGMENT as follows:
Principal/Damages of $3,856.00
Attorney's fees of $720.00
Costs of $165.30
Interest of $256.00
For the total of $4,997.30
Judgment signed in open court.
